title: Nexus StrategyPatchResponse
description: Success response for Strategy patch routes (V1.71). Returns the committed revision and any domain validation diagnostics produced during the patch.

new_revision.description: Canonical graph revision after the patch was persisted.

errors.description: Fatal validation messages that prevented the patch. Always present; empty on success.

warnings.description: Non-fatal validation messages. Always present; empty when none.

side_effects.description: Optional daemon-owned derived updates (e.g. normalized references).
